name: Kartoffelsalat Mit Biermarinade (Potato Salad/Beer Dressi
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes in a medium-size saucepan until just tender.
2. Peel and slice the potatoes.
3. Fry the bacon until crisp. Break into small pieces and mix with onion, celery, and salt; set aside.
4. In a small saucepan, stir together melted butter and flour until blended. Add mustard and sugar. Slowly stir in beer and Tabasco sauce. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
5. Pour the sauce over the potatoes. Sprinkle with parsley. Toss lightly and let stand for 1 hour.
6. Add the bacon mixture; toss gently and serve.
